_meta.name: okta-unlock-user
_meta.description: Unlock a LOCKED_OUT Okta user. Navigates to the user's profile page and clicks Unlock. Only applicable when user status is LOCKED_OUT (too many failed login attempts).
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

userId.description: Okta user ID (format: 00u{alphanumeric}698). User must have LOCKED_OUT status.

anomalies: Unlock button ONLY appears when user status is LOCKED_OUT — it is absent for ACTIVE/STAGED/DEACTIVATED users
Unlock may be a top-level button OR inside the 'More Actions' dropdown depending on Okta version
After unlock, user status returns to ACTIVE — no confirmation dialog expected (immediate action)
Admin's own profile will NOT show Unlock even if locked (Okta self-protection)

chain.note: Navigate to user profile page. User must be in LOCKED_OUT state.
Perceive profile. Confirm status shows LOCKED_OUT. Look for 'Unlock' button in top action area or 'More Actions' dropdown.
Click Unlock button. If not found as top-level, try More Actions dropdown first (s4b).
ENABLE if Unlock was not a top-level button. Opens dropdown to find Unlock.
ENABLE with s4b — click Unlock inside More Actions dropdown.
Verify user status changed from LOCKED_OUT to ACTIVE. Unlock button should no longer be visible.

profile-locked.description: User profile page with LOCKED_OUT status

profile-active.description: User status now ACTIVE after unlock
